name: calculate_roi
description: Calculates return on investment (ROI) based on purchase price, current value, and holding period.

initial_investment.description: The starting value or purchase cost of the investment.

final_value.description: The current or exit value of the investment.
final_value.$comment: Can be lower than initial_investment to represent a loss.

holding_period_days.description: The number of days the investment was held.

include_annualized.description: Whether to return the annualized ROI in addition to absolute ROI.

dividends_received.description: Optional dividends or interest payments received during holding period.
dividends_received.$comment: Added to final_value for net ROI.
